mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_groups ( call_number, group_size, start_time, is_assigned, shown_wait_message, table_id ) VALUES ( #{callNumber}, #{groupSize}, #{startTime}, #{assigned}, #{shownWaitMessage}, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT group_id, call_number, group_size, start_time, is_assigned, shown_wait_message, table_id FROM customer_groups WHERE group_id = #{id}

SELECT group_id, call_number, group_size, start_time, is_assigned, shown_wait_message, table_id FROM customer_groups WHERE call_number = #{callNumber} AND is_assigned = 0 ORDER BY start_time ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_groups SET call_number = #{callNumber}, group_size = #{groupSize}, start_time = #{startTime}, is_assigned = #{assigned}, shown_wait_message = #{shownWaitMessage}, table_id = #{tableId} WHERE group_id = #{group_id}
